definitions: vi./vt. （船只）猛烈撞击后破碎，撞毁

examples.text: Over the centuries, dozens of majestic Old World sailing ships smashed and sank on this irregular stretch of windy Florida coast.
examples.explanation: 这里的 smash 表示“猛烈撞击后破碎、撞毁”。整句意思是：几个世纪以来，数十艘雄伟的旧大陆帆船在佛罗里达这段风大、海岸线曲折的海岸上猛撞后沉没了。

examples.text: majestic Old World sailing ships smashed and sank on this irregular stretch of windy Florida coast.
examples.explanation: 宏伟的旧世界帆船在这片崎岖多风的佛罗里达海岸上撞得粉碎并沉没了。

reviewSessions.example_text: Over the centuries, dozens of majestic Old World sailing ships smashed and sank on this irregular stretch of windy Florida coast.
expected_definitions: vi./vt. （船只）猛烈撞击后破碎，撞毁
reviewSessions.feedback: 准确对应例句中船只撞毁并沉没的含义。
